resumeText: Alex Chen is a Backend Software Engineer with Python, FastAPI, Docker, PostgreSQL, REST API, and RabbitMQ experience. Alex built backend microservices and event-driven workflows.
query: backend engineer python fastapi docker postgres rabbitmq

job_backend.title: Backend Engineer
job_backend.description: Build Python FastAPI services, PostgreSQL schemas, Docker deployments, REST APIs, and RabbitMQ event workflows.
